subcodes.first_line: O two heralds of Truth! Praise be to God that ye have journeyed through diverse regions and spread the fragrant musk of divine mysteries throughout the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منادی حق الحمد لله سفر باقطار نمودید و نافه اسرار و نفحه مشکبار بر جهان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
